full_text:
Zhang Zan ејөз“ҡ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Zan (ејөз“ҡ). A former subordinate of Liu Yu, he joined him in death after cursing Gongsun Zan. Zhang Zan was affiliated with Liu Yu. Zhang Zan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
